M1510_HRT_FAILR_CARE_PLAN_CHG M1510 Heart Fail. Follow-Up: Change In Care Plan This field indicates, if the patient has been diagnosed with heart failure and has exhibited symptoms indicative of heart failure since the previous OASIS assessment, patient education or other clinical interventions were implemented. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x
